chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-162 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5362/2022 14.04.2022 Mr. Aziz Ahmed Laghari, advocate for petitioner *** Urgency is granted. We have perused the petition and it appears that petitioner seeks direction against respondents to refund an amount of Rs.25,63,000/- plus tax amount of Rs.9,25,000/-, total Rs.34,88,000/-, as being paid in excess in respect of Cattle Piri Jhudo. We are afraid that such claim cannot be adjudicated in proceedings under Article 199 of the Constitution. Petitioner may approach the relevant forum, such as Civil Court having jurisdiction in this regard for redressal of his grievance. This petition, being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
